subtitle.en: aged skin and lens accumulate lipofuscin, a yellow-brown fluorescent pigment from lipid peroxidation; the eye lens specifically yellows enough to block blue light by age 70
subtitle.ko: 노화 피부·렌즈에 리포푸신 축적 — 수정체는 70세에 청색 60% 감소

description.en: Crystalline-lens swatch yellows with age; transmittance plot shows blue-end absorption growth. Cataract IOL replacement restores blue perception.
description.ko: 수정체 swatch가 나이에 따라 황변; 투과율 플롯에 청색 흡수 성장. 백내장 IOL 교체로 청색 회복.
